hero.title: One foundation. Every application.
hero.subtitle: Modular, mobile-first, enterprise-grade. Generate ecommerce, marketplaces, booking, rides, CRM and SaaS apps from a single codebase.

trust.title: Built on the modern stack
trust.subtitle: Next.js, TypeScript, Clerk, Neon, Stripe, Mercado Pago, Resend, Twilio, Google Maps, OpenRouter.

modular.title: Modular by design
modular.description: Toggle ecommerce, booking, marketplace, rides, CRM and more without rewriting the app.

premium.title: Premium mobile experience
premium.description: Installable PWA with bottom nav, gestures and offline-ready foundations.

enterprise.title: Enterprise foundations
enterprise.description: Granular permissions, audit logs, feature flags, media manager and a universal status system.

cta.title: Stop rebuilding. Start shipping.
cta.subtitle: Pick modules. Brand the app. Deploy to Vercel.

about.title: About
about.lead: We build the universal foundation that powers modern products.

features.title: Features
features.lead: Everything you need to ship a premium app — and nothing you don't.

pricing.title: Pricing
pricing.lead: Simple, predictable pricing. Edit plans from the admin dashboard.

faq.title: Frequently asked questions
faq.lead: Browse answers organized by topic. Can't find what you need? Contact support.

contact.title: Contact
contact.lead: Get in touch. We'll reply within one business day.

form.name: Name
form.subject: Subject

deleteAccount.title: Account Deletion
deleteAccount.lead: Request permanent deletion of your account and data.

banner.title: We use cookies
banner.body: We use essential cookies to make the site work and optional cookies for analytics. You can change your preferences anytime.
